The placement ofMercury and Venus in Sagittarius is very good for
education. The native gains the affection of all by his good behaviour. As the
Sun has the Mercury-Venus combination in 12th to him, the father of the
native will come from a rich family. But the Sun has Rahu in the second to
him and so the father will face troubles from enemies. The father will have to
face legal troubles, will be duped by others and thus get into trouble. Jupiter
is in own house. This endows the native with devotion to God. The native will
have brothers and sisters.
